summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for PicParty Photo Booth application. All requested features verified working correctly.

issues: CORS warning for PicParty logo image from customer-assets.emergentagent.com - logo may not appear in PDF but download works

passed_tests: PDF Download: 'Imprimir QR' button triggers direct PDF download using pdf.save() - NO about:blank issue
Form Fields: Live Session form has all required fields - Código, Nombre, Tipo de Evento (dropdown), Fecha del Evento (date selector)
Event Type Dropdown: Contains options - Boda, Quinceaños, Cumpleaños, Empresarial, Evento Público, Fiesta, Otro
Date Sorting: Sessions sorted by event_date descending (2026-02-15 appears before 2025-06-15)
Event Type Badge: Purple badge with emoji and type label displayed for each session (💍 Boda, 👑 Quinceaños, etc)
Session Creation: Successfully created test session with all fields
Admin Login: Credentials OCTAVIO/CHELO1980 work correctly
QR Code Generation: QR codes displayed in session list for each event
critical_code_review_comments: CORS issue with PicParty logo image - logo from customer-assets.emergentagent.com may not load in PDF due to missing Access-Control-Allow-Origin header. The PDF still downloads correctly but logo may be missing.
seed_data_creation: Created test session TEST-SESSION-123 for QR testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) PDF download works correctly with pdf.save() - no about:blank, 2) Live session form has Code, Name, Event Type dropdown, and Date selector, 3) Events sorted by date descending, 4) Event type badges shown in list. Minor CORS issue with logo in PDF generation.

pdf_download.details: Clicked 'Imprimir QR' button, PDF download initiated successfully with filename QR_PicParty_[event_name]_[date].pdf

date_sorting.details: Sessions sorted by event_date descending - verified 2026-02-15 appears before 2025-06-15

event_type_badge.details: Purple badges with emoji + type label shown for each session
